title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird of Koah Labs raises $26M for an ad-based monetization platform targeting AI tools, arguing that subscription models have failed AI apps and that human trust, not technology, is the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption. He applies decision-making frameworks from competitive sailing, treating startup building as a high-variability, low-risk proposition.
